title: select_with_fee: n as u64 cast loses high bits if notes.len() > u32::MAX
description: On 64-bit hosts (all nie targets), usize == u64 so selected.len() as u64 is a zero-cost widening with no truncation. On 32-bit (wasm32), the cast zero-extends usize to u64 correctly. The real issue is that an astronomically large note count would make zip317_fee so large that InsufficientFunds is the right answer but FeeConvergence is returned instead. This is a misleading error message under pathological conditions, not a correctness bug in normal use. Reclassified as readability/elegance.
